creative_brief: Founder Rachel in a real grocery aisle looking frustrated (before), then smiling at a FarmThru hub holding labelled farm produce (after). Split-screen or sequence format. Warm, natural lighting. No text overlay except the FarmThru logo.
primary_text:
"I never used to read the label." 

That's how it starts for most families. 'Farm fresh' chicken that never saw grass. 'Free range' eggs from warehouses. 

I wanted to create what didn't exist: real farm-direct groceries you collect from local hubs. Zero middlemen, zero BS.

No middlemen. No commitment. Sydney families collect from the Brookvale hub, Monday to Friday.
headline: I was lying to my kids about food
description: Built FarmThru so families can finally know where their groceries come from. Real farms, fair prices, local collection.
